visual_description: A woman with long reddish hair in a blue striped top stands on a stone staircase, facing a man with dark hair and glasses in a brown jacket. She gently places her hand on his cheek, they look at each other, then she turns and walks up the stairs, leaving him behind. Many students in black uniforms move up and down the stairs in the background.
audio_description: The audio is quiet with a faint, calm voice speaking softly, while distant murmurs and footsteps can be heard. No other distinct sounds are evident.
